description: Classic Journey Tribute reenacts memories from the most influential era of our times. Featuring Chad Smith on lead vocals, backed by musicians that pay unique attention to every detail, Classic Journey Tribute guarantees a unique concert and party experience with iconic anthems and ballads. FANfest benefits Family Access Network, a vital Central Oregon resource for children. Tickets required.
location: Blacksmith Public House, 308 SW Evergreen Ave, Redmond, OR
title: Classic Journey – FANfest Concert Series (Journey Tribute)

description: Get ready for a wild ride through the heart and soul of country music with TOBY, the ultimate tribute to the bad boy of country music, Toby Keith! Hollywood Yates takes center stage, belting out country music anthems — 'How Do You Like Me Now,' 'Should've Been a Cowboy,' and 'I Love This Bar.' FANfest benefits Family Access Network, a vital Central Oregon resource for children. Tickets required.
location: Blacksmith Public House, 308 SW Evergreen Ave, Redmond, OR
title: TOBY: The Experience – FANfest Concert Series (Toby Keith Tribute)

description: This car show takes place in downtown Redmond at Wild Ride Brewing. Enjoy vendors, food trucks, music, and more! Free to attend and family friendly. All years, makes, and models welcome. Register at www.centraloregoncarshows.com.

title: What's Your Wild Ride? Car Show – Downtown Redmond

description: Redmond's R'Oktoberfest is back! Enjoy live music, games, beer, cider, and a ton of fun. Free to attend and family friendly. One of Redmond's favorite fall traditions at Wild Ride Brewing's Redmond Tap Room.
location: Wild Ride Brewing, 332 SW 5th St, Redmond, OR
title: R'Oktoberfest at Wild Ride Brewing

description: Join BrightSide Animal Center for a monthly adoption event at Local Paws! description:
Volunteers meet at Les Schwab Tires in Downtown Redmond to take down American flags after Labor Day display. This is a cherished Redmond tradition — Flag City, USA! All are welcome to help.

Coordinator: Jeff Casserly
Phone: 541-550-6656
Email: jeff@ycob.net
location: Downtown Redmond, OR (between the Post Office and Les Schwab Tires)
title: 🇺🇸 Flag City USA – Take Down the Flags (Labor Day)

description: Meet fantasy author D.E.K. Blair at Herringbone Books on Thursday, August 6 at 6PM. Celebrate the release of Those She Banished, Book One of The Nassaeren Chronicles. Enjoy a discussion, audience Q&A, and book signing. Free and open to the public.
location: Herringbone Bookstore
title: Author Event: D.E.K. Blair

description:
Daniel Seddiqui, International Bestselling Author and Most Traveled Person in American History, will be at Herringbone Bookstore on Tuesday, July 21 at 6PM. 

Join internationally recognized author and speaker Daniel Seddiqui—known for his landmark 50 Jobs in 50 States journey—for an evening celebrating his newest book, Drinkin' Up the Pacific Northwest, the third installment in The Immersive Travel Guide series. Learn about the people, places, and stories behind the Pacific Northwest's celebrated beverage culture, followed by audience Q&A and a book signing.
location: Herringbone Bookstore
title: Author Event: Daniel Seddiqui
